seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient is a 42-year-old female
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient presents for right index finger pain after a skiing injury
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient injured her finger while skiing downhill on double black diamond slopes
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient lost control while skiing and flipped down the slope
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient jammed her right index finger during the skiing fall
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient is unsure what object she jammed her index finger on
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The finger injury occurred on Saturday about five days before the visit
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient has had right index finger pain for about five days
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient rates her right index finger pain as 7 out of 10
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient reports no other injuries from the skiing fall
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient has chronic constipation
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient takes Miralax for chronic constipation
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Miralax seems to relieve the patient's constipation and bowel movements flow nicely
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient had an appendectomy at age seven
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient took ibuprofen for her finger pain
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Ibuprofen did not significantly relieve the patient's finger pain
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient has not iced her injured finger
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient has not used a splint on her injured finger prior to this visit
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician reviewed an x-ray of the patient's right hand
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The x-ray was of the patient's right hand including the index finger
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The right hand x-ray showed all joints and bones in the right places
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The right hand x-ray showed no fractures
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician assessed the right hand x-ray as normal
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient has pain when the clinician presses on the injured finger
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient has pain when the clinician pulls on the injured finger
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient has pain when the clinician squeezes over the affected joint of the finger
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient has pain when the clinician squeezes another area of the injured finger
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: On exam and x-ray, the clinician diagnoses a sprain of the distal interphalangeal (DIP) joint of the right index finger
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician plans to place a splint on the patient's right index finger
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician will prescribe Mobic for the patient's finger injury
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Mobic is described as a strong anti-inflammatory medication
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The planned Mobic dose is 15 milligrams once a day
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician plans to prescribe 14 tablets of Mobic
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician wants the patient to return for follow-up in two weeks
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: At the two-week follow-up, the clinician will check if the finger has healed
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician may start hand therapy at the follow-up visit if needed
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician instructs the system to order the medications and procedures mentioned in the visit
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician
